issues.description: Three equally-weighted stat tiles (Projects/Inbox/Flags) violate Rule 1 — no equal-weight tile grids.
issues.suggestedFix: Replace with a single compact grouped list: one row per metric using 'flex justify-between' at 44px height inside a #1C1C1E surface, or promote one KPI as the true hero and demote the rest to subhead rows.

issues.description: Blue, orange, and red accent labels appear simultaneously in the same tiles row — exceeds 2-3 accent max.
issues.suggestedFix: Use a single accent (#0A84FF) or #8E8E93 for all three labels. Reserve color differentiation for semantically distinct states (e.g., red only if Flags > 0 and urgent).

issues.description: Emoji icons (📋📥🚩) in stat tiles undermine the premium iOS aesthetic — reads as generic SaaS dashboard.
issues.suggestedFix: Replace emoji with monochrome SVG icons at 20px sized to match SF Symbol style. Use accent color only on the icon, not surrounding it.

issues.description: Date string 'Friday, March 20' rendered in amber/orange accent — not semantically meaningful for a date.
issues.suggestedFix: Change color to text-[#8E8E93] (secondary text). Reserve orange/amber for urgency or active states only.

issues.description: Needs Attention cards have a visible 1px orange border — Rule 5/9 say use background contrast, not borders.
issues.suggestedFix: Remove border. Use bg-[#2C2C2E] surface and rely on contrast with #1C1C1E page background. Keep the orange left-dot indicator for semantic urgency.

issues.description: Focus task rows have no chevron, giving no affordance that rows are drill-down interactive.
issues.suggestedFix: Add <ChevronRight size={16} className='text-[#636366] ml-auto shrink-0' /> to each row's right side. Ensure row has min-h-[44px] for touch target.

issues.description: Sidebar settings icon: 34×34px bounds < 44pt min touch target; text-white/25 (~4% contrast) fails 4.5:1.
issues.suggestedFix: Set min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] on the anchor, increase icon opacity to text-white/50 minimum, and add aria-label='Settings'.

issues.description: Greeting h1 renders at ~30px; Large Title spec requires 34px bold for page greeting.
issues.suggestedFix: Change text-[30px] to text-[34px] (or use text-[2.125rem]) with font-bold tracking-tight.

issues.description: 'Full view → →' uses a redundant double arrow — unclear affordance and inconsistent with 'See all →' pattern.
issues.location: Focus section header — full view link
issues.suggestedFix: Standardize to 'Full view →' (single arrow) across all section headers. Match font-size 13px text-[#0A84FF] consistently.

issues.description: Active nav state uses a heavy filled orange rounded rect — high visual weight vs the glass sidebar tone.
issues.suggestedFix: Replace solid orange bg with bg-white/10 + a 2px left accent bar or text-[#FF9F0A] with icon filled. Reduces visual heaviness while preserving active state clarity.

summary: The dashboard has a solid dark foundation with good mobile structure and a consistent orange accent language, but the equally-weighted stat tiles, simultaneous multi-accent color use, and emoji icons push it toward generic SaaS rather than premium personal OS. Accessibility gaps (settings icon touch target, low-contrast footer) and missing interaction affordances (no chevrons, double arrow) are the most actionable near-term fixes.
topPriorities: Replace the 3 equal stat tiles with a compact grouped-list summary row or single focal KPI — eliminates the biggest hierarchy and vibe violations simultaneously.
Swap emoji tile icons for monochrome SVG icons and unify tile label colors to a single accent — resolves color overload and lifts premium feel immediately.
Fix settings icon to 44×44px touch target with text-white/50 minimum opacity, and add chevrons to all drill-down task rows — addresses the two highest accessibility and interaction gaps.
